text:
Risk is inherent and inevitable in all human activities. In business, risk is a variable that cannot be eliminated. Risk management acknowledges that risk can be reduced or its impact diminished only under specific operating conditions.

Classification of risks is a very broad and highly complex task. Different classifications have been proposed in the scientific literature that meet the specific needs of the objectives for which each one is intended. The purpose of the classification of risks is to assign individual threats to classes according to specific criteria. In this research work, a theoretical revision of the classifications of risks will be carried out, especially those referring to business and industrial activities, for the purpose of contributing to the development of the scientific basis of Risk Management.
